text: I'll start by reading the repository structure and the relevant files.

input.description: List Go files in the repository

content:
1	# cert-manager-operator — Agent Navigation Hub
2	
3	The cert-manager Operator for OpenShift installs and manages three PKI-related
4	operands on behalf of cluster administrators: cert-manager (the core certificate
5	lifecycle controller, webhook, and cainjector), trust-manager (a cluster-wide CA
6	bundle distributor), and istio-csr (a gRPC bridge that allows Istio to request
7	certificates from cert-manager). All operator machinery lives in the
8	`cert-manager-operator` namespace; all operands deploy into the `cert-manager`
9	namespace (hardcoded). Each operand is governed by a cluster-scoped singleton
10	custom resource (`CertManager/cluster`, `TrustManager/cluster`,
11	`IstioCSR/default`), and image references come exclusively from
12	`RELATED_IMAGE_*` environment variables injected by OLM.
13	
14	---
15	
16	## Component map
17	
18	| Component | Location | Role |
19	|---|---|---|
20	| API types | `api/operator/v1alpha1/` | CertManager, TrustManager, IstioCSR CRD structs + CEL validation |
21	| cert-manager controllers (library-go) | `pkg/controller/certmanager/` | Deploy/reconcile controller, webhook, cainjector using library-go hooks |
22	| TrustManager controller (controller-runtime) | `pkg/controller/trustmanager/` | Deploy trust-manager via SSA; manages CA bundle hash annotation |
23	| IstioCSR controller (controller-runtime) | `pkg/controller/istiocsr/` | Deploy istio-csr agent; manages per-namespace singleton |
24	| Embedded manifests (bindata) | `bindata/` + `pkg/operator/assets/` | Upstream YAML compiled into the binary via go-bindata |
25	| OptionalInformer / API discovery | `pkg/operator/utils/apidiscovery.go` | Detects absent OpenShift APIs (MicroShift compat) |
26	| Operator startup | `pkg/cmd/operator/cmd.go`, `pkg/operator/` | library-go `controllercmd` wiring, informer setup |
27	| Version/image metadata | `pkg/version/` | Embedded build-time version for status reporting |
28	
29	---
30	
31	## Key workflows
32	
33	### Add a new field to CertManager, TrustManager, or IstioCSR spec
34	
35	1. Edit the relevant `*_types.go` in `api/operator/v1alpha1/`.
36	2. Add kubebuilder marker comments (`+kubebuilder:validation:...`). For
37	   fields that must be immutable after first set, add a CEL rule:
38	   `+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf == '' || self == oldSelf"`.
39	3. Run `make update` to regenerate CRD YAML and deepcopy functions.
40	4. Implement the spec field's effect in the matching controller:
41	   - **CertManager** → add a `DeploymentHookFunc` in
42	     `pkg/controller/certmanager/` and register it in
43	     `newGenericDeploymentController`.
44	   - **TrustManager/IstioCSR** → add a named mutation function and call it
45	     from `getDeploymentObject` (after `validateDeploymentManifest`).
46	5. Add unit tests in `*_test.go` alongside the new hook/function.
47	6. Update e2e tests under `test/e2e/` and verify with `make test-e2e`.
48	
49	### Add a new operand mutation function (TrustManager / IstioCSR path)
50	
51	1. Locate `pkg/controller/trustmanager/deployments.go` or
52	   `pkg/controller/istiocsr/deployments.go`.
53	2. Write a new named function `updateXxx(deployment *appsv1.Deployment, ...) error`.
54	3. Call it from `getDeploymentObject`, **after** the
55	   `validateDeploymentManifest(deployment)` guard and in the intended application
56	   order (image override must come before resource overrides, etc.).
57	4. For cert-manager (library-go path): write a `DeploymentHookFunc` in
58	   `pkg/controller/certmanager/`, append it to the `hooks` slice inside
59	   `newGenericDeploymentController`. Hook ordering matters — break-glass
60	   `withUnsupportedArgsOverrideHook` must remain last.
61	5. Run `make test` to confirm existing tests still pass.
62	
63	### Add an optional informer for a new OpenShift API
64	
65	1. Define the GVR you need (group, version, resource string).
66	2. In `pkg/operator/` (near existing informer wiring), call:
67	   ```go
68	   myInformer, err := utils.InitInformerIfAvailable(
69	       utils.NewResourceDiscoverer(myGVR, discoveryClient),
70	       func() myapi.SharedInformerFactory { return myapi.NewSharedInformerFactory(...) },
71	   )
72	   ```
73	3. Pass `myInformer` to the controller constructor.
74	4. Inside the controller, guard every use with `myInformer.Applicable()`.
75	   When false the controller must degrade gracefully (no-op, not error).
76	5. The discoverer treats API-not-found as `(false, nil)`, so MicroShift and
77	   vanilla Kubernetes clusters continue to work without the API group.
78	
79	---
80	
81	## Troubleshooting quick-reference
82	
83	| Symptom | One-line solution |
84	|---|---|
85	| Operator loop-crashes with "invalid trust-manager deployment manifest" | The embedded bindata YAML fails `validateDeploymentManifest`; run `make update` and ensure `bindata/trust-manager/` matches the expected schema |
86	| Operand pod not restarting after CA bundle ConfigMap update | Check that the SHA-256 annotation (`cert-manager.io/ca-bundle-hash`) on the pod template was updated; the hash covers PEM content, not `resourceVersion` |
87	| Immutable field rejection at admission (CEL error) | Attempt to change a `XValidation`-guarded field; delete and recreate the CR, or accept the current value |
88	| `RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_*` not found, pod uses wrong image | OLM env injection missing; verify the CSV `relatedImages` section and that the operator pod env vars are set |
89	| IstioCSR controller does nothing | Feature gate `IstioCSR=true` must be passed via `--unsupported-addon-features` flag; it is off by default |
90	
91	---
92	
93	## Further reading
94	
95	- [agentic/DESIGN.md](agentic/DESIGN.md) — architecture decisions and reconciliation flow
96	- [agentic/DEVELOPMENT.md](agentic/DEVELOPMENT.md) — local dev setup, make targets
97	- [agentic/TESTING.md](agentic/TESTING.md) — unit, e2e, and coverage guidance
98	- [agentic/RELIABILITY.md](agentic/RELIABILITY.md) — status conditions, degraded handling
99	- [agentic/SECURITY.md](agentic/SECURITY.md) — CEL policies, network policies, RBAC
100	
101	### Component deep-dives
102	
103	- [TrustManager controller](agentic/design-docs/components/trustmanager-controller.md)
104	- [IstioCSR controller](agentic/design-docs/components/istiocsr-controller.md)
105	- [OptionalInformer](agentic/design-docs/components/optional-informer.md)
106	
107	### Concepts
108	
109	- [Singleton pattern](agentic/domain/concepts/singleton-pattern.md)
110

1	package v1alpha1
2	
3	import (
4		corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
5		metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
6	
7		certmanagerv1 "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
8	)
9	
10	func init() {
11		SchemeBuilder.Register(&IstioCSR{}, &IstioCSRList{})
12	}
13	
14	// +k8s:deepcopy-gen:interfaces=k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object
15	// +kubebuilder:object:root=true
16	
17	// IstioCSRList is a list of IstioCSR objects.
18	type IstioCSRList struct {
19		metav1.TypeMeta `json:",inline"`
20	
21		// metadata is the standard list's metadata.
22		// More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata
23		metav1.ListMeta `json:"metadata"`
24	
25		Items []IstioCSR `json:"items"`
26	}
27	
28	// +genclient
29	// +k8s:deepcopy-gen:interfaces=k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object
30	// +kubebuilder:object:root=true
31	// +kubebuilder:subresource:status
32	// +kubebuilder:resource:path=istiocsrs,scope=Namespaced,categories={cert-manager-operator, istio-csr, istiocsr}
33	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name="GRPC Endpoint",type="string",JSONPath=".status.istioCSRGRPCEndpoint"
34	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name="Ready",type="string",JSONPath=".status.conditions[?(@.type=='Ready')].status"
35	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name="Message",type="string",JSONPath=".status.conditions[?(@.type=='Ready')].message"
36	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name="AGE",type="date",JSONPath=".metadata.creationTimestamp"
37	// +kubebuilder:metadata:labels={"app.kubernetes.io/name=istiocsr", "app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager-operator"}
38	
39	// IstioCSR describes the configuration and information about the managed istio-csr agent.
40	// The name must be `default` to make IstioCSR a singleton that is, to allow only one instance of IstioCSR per namespace.
41	//
42	// When an IstioCSR is created, istio-csr agent is deployed in the IstioCSR-created namespace.
43	//
44	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self.metadata.name == 'default'",message="istiocsr is a singleton, .metadata.name must be 'default'"
45	// +operator-sdk:csv:customresourcedefinitions:displayName="IstioCSR"
46	type IstioCSR struct {
47		metav1.TypeMeta `json:",inline"`
48	
49		// metadata is the standard object's metadata.
50		// More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata
51		metav1.ObjectMeta `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
52	
53		// spec is the specification of the desired behavior of the IstioCSR.
54		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
55		// +required
56		Spec IstioCSRSpec `json:"spec"`
57	
58		// status is the most recently observed status of the IstioCSR.
59		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
60		// +optional
61		Status IstioCSRStatus `json:"status,omitempty"`
62	}
63	
64	// IstioCSRSpec is the specification of the desired behavior of the IstioCSR.
65	type IstioCSRSpec struct {
66		// istioCSRConfig configures the istio-csr agent's behavior.
67		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
68		// +required
69		IstioCSRConfig IstioCSRConfig `json:"istioCSRConfig"`
70	
71		// controllerConfig configures the controller for setting up defaults to enable the istio-csr agent.
72		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
73		// +optional
74		ControllerConfig *ControllerConfig `json:"controllerConfig,omitempty"`
75	}
76	
77	// IstioCSRConfig configures the istio-csr agent's behavior.
78	type IstioCSRConfig struct {
79		// logLevel supports a value range as per [Kubernetes logging guidelines](https://github.com/kubernetes/community/blob/master/contributors/devel/sig-instrumentation/logging.md#what-method-to-use).
80		// +kubebuilder:default:=1
81		// +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum:=1
82		// +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum:=5
83		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
84		// +optional
85		LogLevel int32 `json:"logLevel,omitempty"`
86	
87		// logFormat specifies the output format for istio-csr agent logging.
88		// Supported log formats are text and json.
89		// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:="text";"json"
90		// +kubebuilder:default:="text"
91		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
92		// +optional
93		LogFormat string `json:"logFormat,omitempty"`
94	
95		// Istio-csr creates a ConfigMap named `istio-ca-root-cert` containing the root CA certificate, which the Istio data plane uses to verify server certificates. Its default behavior is to create and monitor ConfigMaps in all namespaces.
96		// The istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector restricts the namespaces where the ConfigMap is created by using label selectors, such as maistra.io/member-of=istio-system. This selector is also attached to all desired namespaces that are part of the data plane.
97		// This field can have a maximum of 4096 characters.
98		// +kubebuilder:example:="maistra.io/member-of=istio-system"
99		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0
100		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=4096
101		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
102		// +optional
103		IstioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector string `json:"istioDataPlaneNamespaceSelector,omitempty"`
104	
105		// certManager is for configuring cert-manager specifics.
106		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
107		// +required
108		CertManager CertManagerConfig `json:"certManager"`
109	
110		// istiodTLSConfig is for configuring istiod certificate specifics.
111		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
112		// +required
113		IstiodTLSConfig IstiodTLSConfig `json:"istiodTLSConfig"`
114	
115		// server is for configuring the server endpoint used by istio for obtaining the certificates.
116		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
117		// +optional
118		Server *ServerConfig `json:"server,omitempty"`
119	
120		// istio is for configuring the istio specifics.
121		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
122		// +required
123		Istio IstioConfig `json:"istio"`
124	
125		// resources is for defining the resource requirements.
126		// Cannot be updated.
127		// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/
128		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
129		// +optional
130		Resources corev1.ResourceRequirements `json:"resources,omitempty"`
131	
132		// affinity is for setting scheduling affinity rules.
133		// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/
134		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
135		// +optional
136		Affinity *corev1.Affinity `json:"affinity,omitempty"`
137	
138		// tolerations is for setting the pod tolerations.
139		// This field can have a maximum of 50 entries.
140		// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/taint-and-toleration/
141		// +listType=atomic
142		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems:=0
143		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems:=50
144		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
145		// +optional
146		Tolerations []corev1.Toleration `json:"tolerations,omitempty"`
147	
148		// nodeSelector is for defining the scheduling criteria using node labels.
149		// This field can have a maximum of 50 entries.
150		// ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/assign-pod-node/
151		// +mapType=atomic
152		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinProperties:=0
153		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxProperties:=50
154		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
155		// +optional
156		NodeSelector map[string]string `json:"nodeSelector,omitempty"`
157	}
158	
159	// CertManagerConfig is for configuring cert-manager specifics.
160	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(oldSelf.issuerRef) && !has(self.issuerRef) || has(oldSelf.issuerRef) && has(self.issuerRef)",message="issuerRef may only be configured during creation"
161	type CertManagerConfig struct {
162		// issuerRef contains details of the referenced object used for obtaining certificates.
163		// When `issuerRef.Kind` is `Issuer`, it must exist in the `.spec.istioCSRConfig.istio.namespace`.
164		// This field is immutable once set.
165		// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self == oldSelf",message="issuerRef is immutable once set"
166		// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self.kind.lowerAscii() == 'issuer' || self.kind.lowerAscii() == 'clusterissuer'",message="kind must be either 'Issuer' or 'ClusterIssuer'"
167		// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self.group.lowerAscii() == 'cert-manager.io'",message="group must be 'cert-manager.io'"
168		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
169		// +required
170		IssuerRef certmanagerv1.ObjectReference `json:"issuerRef"`
171	
172		// istioCACertificate when provided, the operator will use the CA certificate from the specified ConfigMap.
173		// If empty, the operator will automatically extract the CA certificate from the Secret containing the istiod certificate obtained from cert-manager.
174		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
175		// +optional
176		IstioCACertificate *ConfigMapReference `json:"istioCACertificate,omitempty"`
177	}
178	
179	// IstiodTLSConfig is for configuring istiod certificate specifics.
180	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(oldSelf.privateKeyAlgorithm) && !has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm) || has(oldSelf.privateKeyAlgorithm) && has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm)",message="privateKeyAlgorithm may only be configured during creation"
181	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(oldSelf.privateKeySize) && !has(self.privateKeySize) || has(oldSelf.privateKeySize) && has(self.privateKeySize)",message="privateKeySize may only be configured during creation"
182	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="(!has(self.privateKeyAlgorithm) || self.privateKeyAlgorithm == 'RSA') ? (self.privateKeySize in [2048,4096,8192]) : (self.privateKeySize in [256,384])",message="privateKeySize must match with configured privateKeyAlgorithm"
183	type IstiodTLSConfig struct {
184		// commonName is the common name to be set in the cert-manager.io Certificate created for istiod.
185		// The commonName will be of the form istiod.<istio_namespace>.svc when not set.
186		// This field can have a maximum of 64 characters.
187		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0
188		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=64
189		// +kubebuilder:example:="istiod.istio-system.svc"
190		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
191		// +optional
192		CommonName string `json:"commonName,omitempty"`
193	
194		// trustDomain is the Istio cluster's trust domain, which will also be used for deriving the SPIFFE URI.
195		// This field can have a maximum of 63 characters.
196		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=1
197		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=63
198		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
199		// +required
200		TrustDomain string `json:"trustDomain"`
201	
202		// certificateDNSNames contains the additional DNS names to be added to the istiod certificate SAN.
203		// This field can have a maximum of 25 entries.
204		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems:=0
205		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems:=25
206		// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MinLength:=1
207		// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MaxLength:=253
208		// +listType=set
209		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
210		// +optional
211		CertificateDNSNames []string `json:"certificateDNSNames,omitempty"`
212	
213		// certificateDuration is the validity period for the istio-csr and istiod certificates.
214		// +kubebuilder:default:="1h"
215		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
216		// +optional
217		CertificateDuration *metav1.Duration `json:"certificateDuration,omitempty"`
218	
219		// certificateRenewBefore is the time before expiry to renew the istio-csr and istiod certificates.
220		// +kubebuilder:default:="30m"
221		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
222		// +optional
223		CertificateRenewBefore *metav1.Duration `json:"certificateRenewBefore,omitempty"`
224	
225		// privateKeySize is the key size for the istio-csr and istiod certificates. Allowed values when privateKeyAlgorithm is RSA are 2048, 4096, 8192; and for ECDSA, they are 256, 384.
226		// This field is immutable once set.
227		// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:=256;384;2048;4096;8192
228		// +kubebuilder:default:=2048
229		// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf == 0 || self == oldSelf",message="privateKeySize is immutable once set"
230		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
231		// +optional
232		PrivateKeySize int32 `json:"privateKeySize,omitempty"`
233	
234		// privateKeyAlgorithm is the algorithm to use when generating private keys. Allowed values are RSA, and ECDSA.
235		// This field is immutable once set.
236		// +kubebuilder:default:="RSA"
237		// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum:="RSA";"ECDSA"
238		// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf == '' || self == oldSelf",message="privateKeyAlgorithm is immutable once set"
239		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
240		// +optional
241		PrivateKeyAlgorithm string `json:"privateKeyAlgorithm,omitempty"`
242	
243		// MaxCertificateDuration is the maximum validity duration that can be requested for a certificate.
244		// +kubebuilder:default:="1h"
245		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
246		// +optional
247		MaxCertificateDuration *metav1.Duration `json:"maxCertificateDuration,omitempty"`
248	}
249	
250	// ServerConfig is for configuring the server endpoint used by istio
251	// for obtaining the certificates.
252	type ServerConfig struct {
253		// clusterID is the Istio cluster ID used to verify incoming CSRs.
254		// This field can have a maximum of 253 characters.
255		// +kubebuilder:default:="Kubernetes"
256		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=0
257		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=253
258		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
259		// +optional
260		ClusterID string `json:"clusterID,omitempty"`
261	
262		// port to serve the istio-csr gRPC service.
263		// +kubebuilder:default:=443
264		// +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum:=1
265		// +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum:=65535
266		// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf == 0 || self == oldSelf",message="port is immutable once set"
267		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
268		// +optional
269		Port int32 `json:"port,omitempty"`
270	}
271	
272	// IstioConfig is for configuring the istio specifics.
273	type IstioConfig struct {
274		// revisions are the Istio revisions that are currently installed in the cluster.
275		// Changing this field will modify the DNS names that will be requested for the istiod certificate.
276		// This field can have a maximum of 25 entries.
277		// +listType=set
278		// +kubebuilder:default:={"default"}
279		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems=0
280		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxItems=25
281		// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MinLength:=1
282		// +kubebuilder:validation:items:MaxLength:=63
283		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
284		// +optional
285		Revisions []string `json:"revisions,omitempty"`
286	
287		// namespace of the Istio control plane.
288		// This field can have a maximum of 63 characters.
289		// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self == oldSelf",message="namespace is immutable once set"
290		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinLength:=1
291		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxLength:=63
292		// +kubebuilder:validation:Required
293		// +required
294		Namespace string `json:"namespace"`
295	}
296	
297	// ControllerConfig configures the controller for setting up defaults to
298	// enable the istio-csr agent.
299	type ControllerConfig struct {
300		// labels to apply to all resources created for the istio-csr agent deployment.
301		// This field can have a maximum of 20 entries.
302		// +mapType=granular
303		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinProperties:=0
304		// +kubebuilder:validation:MaxProperties:=20
305		// +kubebuilder:validation:Optional
306		// +optional
307		Labels map[string]string `json:"labels,omitempty"`
308	}
309	
310	// IstioCSRStatus is the most recently observed status of the IstioCSR.
311	type IstioCSRStatus struct {
312		// conditions holds information about the current state of the istio-csr agent deployment.
313		ConditionalStatus `json:",inline,omitempty"`
314	
315		// istioCSRImage is the name of the image and the tag used for deploying istio-csr.
316		IstioCSRImage string `json:"istioCSRImage,omitempty"`
317	
318		// istioCSRGRPCEndpoint is the service endpoint of istio-csr, made available for users to configure in the istiod config to enable Istio to use istio-csr for certificate requests.
319		IstioCSRGRPCEndpoint string `json:"istioCSRGRPCEndpoint,omitempty"`
320	
321		// serviceAccount created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.
322		ServiceAccount string `json:"serviceAccount,omitempty"`
323	
324		// clusterRole created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.
325		ClusterRole string `json:"clusterRole,omitempty"`
326	
327		// clusterRoleBinding created by the controller for the istio-csr agent.
328		ClusterRoleBinding string `json:"clusterRoleBinding,omitempty"`
329	}
330

1	# cert-manager-operator — Architecture and Design
2	
3	## 1. Dual framework decision: library-go vs controller-runtime
4	
5	The operator uses two distinct reconciliation frameworks, and the split is
6	deliberate.
7	
8	**cert-manager core (cainjector, controller, webhook) uses library-go.**
9	
10	`pkg/cmd/operator/cmd.go` bootstraps with
11	`controllercmd.NewControllerCommandConfig`, the standard OpenShift cluster
12	operator entrypoint. Each of the three cert-manager deployments is reconciled by
13	`deploymentcontroller.NewDeploymentController` from
14	`github.com/openshift/library-go/pkg/operator/deploymentcontroller`. This gives
15	the cert-manager tier:
16	
17	- Automatic `ClusterOperator` status management (Available / Progressing /
18	  Degraded conditions) wired to OpenShift's cluster version operator.
19	- A built-in Managed/Unmanaged/Removed state machine via `apiv1.OperatorSpec`
20	  (embedded in `CertManagerSpec`).
21	- Generation-based re-queue, liveness, and leader election that meets OpenShift
22	  platform SLO requirements.
23	- Proven integration with `config.openshift.io` infrastructure APIs (proxy,
24	  TLS security profile, cloud credentials).
25	
26	**TrustManager and IstioCSR use controller-runtime.**
27	
28	These two operands were introduced after the cert-manager core and do not appear
29	in the `ClusterOperator` API surface. They do not need the heavyweight library-go
30	status machinery and are expected to work on upstream Kubernetes clusters as
31	well as on OpenShift (trust-manager in particular is a CNCF project with broad
32	adoption). Using `sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime` directly:
33	
34	- Reduces coupling to OpenShift-specific APIs.
35	- Allows simpler reconcile loops (no factory controller abstraction).
36	- Lets each controller own its full state via SSA (Server-Side Apply) with
37	  `client.ForceOwnership`, rather than the library-go ownership model.
38	
39	The two frameworks coexist inside the same binary: the library-go controllers
40	are started by `operator.RunOperator` (called by `controllercmd`), and the
41	controller-runtime controllers are started by a `ctrl.Manager` also brought up
42	inside `RunOperator`.
43	
44	---
45	
46	## 2. Singleton pattern
47	
48	All three CRDs enforce a singleton instance per scope at the API layer.
49	
50	| CRD | Scope | Enforced name | Mechanism |
51	|---|---|---|---|
52	| CertManager | Cluster | `cluster` | Operator auto-creates if absent; no CEL needed (only one can exist with that name) |
53	| TrustManager | Cluster | `cluster` | CEL: `self.metadata.name == 'cluster'` on the resource root |
54	| IstioCSR | Namespaced | `default` | CEL: `self.metadata.name == 'default'` on the resource root |
55	
56	The CEL rules are evaluated at admission time and produce a human-readable
57	rejection message before the object reaches etcd. This means no reconciler
58	code needs to guard against multiple instances; the API server rejects them
59	outright.
60	
61	IstioCSR being namespaced (rather than cluster-scoped) is intentional: it
62	permits deploying one istio-csr agent per Istio control-plane namespace while
63	still banning duplicate instances within a single namespace.
64	
65	---
66	
67	## 3. Bindata + imperative mutation pipeline
68	
69	### Embedded manifests
70	
71	Upstream release YAML is downloaded at build time into `bindata/` and compiled
72	into the binary via go-bindata. At runtime, `pkg/operator/assets/bindata.go`
73	exposes `assets.MustAsset(name)` which returns the raw bytes of the embedded
74	file.
75	
76	### cert-manager pipeline (library-go `DeploymentHookFunc`)
77	
78	`pkg/controller/certmanager/generic_deployment_controller.go` builds a slice of
79	`deploymentcontroller.DeploymentHookFunc` values and passes them to
80	`deploymentcontroller.NewDeploymentController`:
81	
82	```
83	hooks := []deploymentcontroller.DeploymentHookFunc{
84	    withOperandImageOverrideHook,       // RELATED_IMAGE_* env → container image
85	    withLogLevel,                       // operator log level → -v flag
86	    withPodLabelsOverrideHook(...),     // CertManagerSpec.*.OverrideLabels
87	    withPodLabelsValidateHook(...),     // validate no reserved labels
88	    withContainerArgsOverrideHook(...), // CertManagerSpec.*.OverrideArgs
89	    withContainerArgsValidateHook(...),
90	    withProxyEnv,                       // cluster-wide HTTP_PROXY / NO_PROXY
91	    withContainerEnvOverrideHook(...),
92	    withContainerEnvValidateHook(...),
93	    withDeploymentReplicasOverrideHook(...),
94	    withContainerResourcesOverrideHook(...),
95	    withContainerResourcesValidateHook(...),
96	    withPodSchedulingOverrideHook(...),
97	    withPodSchedulingValidateHook(...),
98	    withCAConfigMap(...),               // mount trusted CA bundle if configured
99	    withSABoundToken,                   // projected ServiceAccount token volume
100	    // if OpenShift infra API is present:
101	    withCloudCredentials(...),          // ambient cloud credentials
102	    common.WithClusterTLSProfileFromAPIServer(...),
103	    // always appended last:
104	    withUnsupportedArgsOverrideHook,   // break-glass args win over TLS profile
105	}
106	```
107	
108	Each hook receives a pointer to the decoded `*appsv1.Deployment` and mutates it
109	in place. The library-go framework applies all hooks, then diffs the result
110	against the live object and applies via SSA.
111	
112	### TrustManager / IstioCSR pipeline (controller-runtime)
113	
114	`getDeploymentObject` in `pkg/controller/trustmanager/deployments.go` (and its
115	IstioCSR equivalent) follows a strict sequence:
116	
117	```
118	1. deployment := common.DecodeObjBytes[*appsv1.Deployment](codecs, gvk, assets.MustAsset(...))
119	2. validateDeploymentManifest(deployment)   // GUARD — panics on nil containers etc.
120	3. common.UpdateName(deployment, ...)
121	4. common.UpdateNamespace(deployment, ...)
122	5. common.UpdateResourceLabels(deployment, ...)
123	6. updateResourceAnnotations(...)
124	7. updatePodTemplateLabels(...)
125	8. updateDeploymentArgs(deployment, trustManager)
126	9. updateServiceAccountName(deployment)
127	10. updateTLSSecretVolume(deployment)
128	11. updateDefaultCAPackageVolume(deployment, ..., caBundleHash)  // hash annotation here
129	12. updateImage(deployment)                // reads RELATED_IMAGE_* env
130	13. updateResourceRequirements(deployment, ...)
131	14. updateAffinityRules(deployment, ...)
132	15. updatePodTolerations(deployment, ...)
133	16. updateNodeSelector(deployment, ...)
134	```
135	
136	`validateDeploymentManifest` is the mandatory first mutation guard. If the
137	embedded YAML is malformed (e.g., missing container entries after a bindata
138	regeneration error), the function returns an `IrrecoverableError` and the
139	reconciler stops retrying, emitting a Degraded condition instead of looping.
140	
141	---
142	
143	## 4. OptionalInformer pattern
144	
145	Several features depend on OpenShift-specific API groups
146	(`config.openshift.io`, `cloudcredential.openshift.io`) that are absent on
147	MicroShift and vanilla Kubernetes. The `OptionalInformer` generic type in
148	`pkg/operator/utils/apidiscovery.go` provides a clean abstraction:
149	
150	```go
151	// Discover whether the API is served.
152	discoverer := utils.NewResourceDiscoverer(infraGVR, discoveryClient)
153	
154	// If served, initialize the informer; otherwise InformerFactory stays nil.
155	infraInformer, err := utils.InitInformerIfAvailable(
156	    discoverer,
157	    func() configinformers.SharedInformerFactory {
158	        return configinformers.NewSharedInformerFactory(configClient, resyncPeriod)
159	    },
160	)
161	
162	// At any call site:
163	if infraInformer.Applicable() {
164	    hooks = append(hooks, withCloudCredentials(...))
165	}
166	```
167	
168	`Discover()` treats a `NotFound` error from the API server's discovery endpoint
169	as `(false, nil)` — not an error condition. Any other discovery error is
170	propagated and prevents startup, because an ambiguous discovery result could
171	silently omit a required security hook.
172	
173	The pattern is enforced throughout: no code path may call methods on
174	`*infraInformer.InformerFactory` without first checking `Applicable()`. This
175	is the only approved mechanism for conditional OpenShift feature enablement;
176	`//go:build` tags and runtime `os.Getenv` checks for platform are not used.
177	
178	---
179	
180	## 5. Image source policy
181	
182	Container images for all operands come exclusively from `RELATED_IMAGE_*`
183	environment variables injected by OLM at install time:
184	
185	| Env var | Operand container |
186	|---|---|
187	| `RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_CONTROLLER` | cert-manager controller |
188	| `RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_WEBHOOK` | cert-manager webhook |
189	| `RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_CAINJECTOR` | cert-manager cainjector |
190	| `RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_TRUST_MANAGER` | trust-manager |
191	| `RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR` | istio-csr |
192	
193	No image reference appears in any CRD spec field, in any bindata YAML, or as a
194	Go string literal in application code. The `updateImage` mutation functions and
195	`withOperandImageOverrideHook` read the environment at reconcile time and write
196	the resolved image into the deployment's container spec.
197	
198	This design ensures that:
199	- Air-gapped clusters can mirror images and configure them via the CSV without
200	  changing any operator code.
201	- OLM's relatedImages graph drives all image pinning and digest resolution.
202	- The CRD API surface never leaks image coordinates to end users, preventing
203	  accidental injection of untrusted images via spec updates.
204	
205	---
206	
207	## 6. CEL immutability enforcement
208	
209	Security-critical and operationally irreversible fields are locked at API
210	admission via `x-kubernetes-validations` CEL rules. No reconciler code is
211	needed to re-enforce these invariants.
212	
213	Key examples:
214	
215	```go
216	// CertManager: network policy cannot be downgraded once enabled
217	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf != 'true' || self == 'true'"
218	
219	// CertManager: network policy rules are immutable once network policies are active
220	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf.all(op, self.exists(p, p.name == op.name && p.componentName == op.componentName))"
221	
222	// TrustManager: trust namespace cannot change after creation
223	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf == '' || self == oldSelf"
224	
225	// IstioCSR: issuerRef is immutable once set
226	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self == oldSelf"
227	
228	// IstioCSR: private key algorithm and size are immutable once set
229	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf == '' || self == oldSelf"
230	
231	// IstioCSR: gRPC server port is immutable once set
232	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="oldSelf == 0 || self == oldSelf"
233	
234	// IstioCSR: Istio control-plane namespace is immutable
235	// +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self == oldSelf"
236	```
237	
238	The pattern `oldSelf == <zero> || self == oldSelf` handles the initial-creation
239	case: when the field has never been set (`oldSelf` is the zero value), any value
240	is allowed. Once a non-zero value is persisted, only the same value is accepted
241	on subsequent updates.
242	
243	---
244	
245	## 7. Hash-triggered rolling restart
246	
247	trust-manager's `defaultCAPackage` feature injects OpenShift's system CA bundle
248	into the operand pod. The bundle lives in a ConfigMap; its content can rotate
249	without the ConfigMap's `resourceVersion` changing in a way that triggers a
250	Deployment rollout.
251	
252	The operator computes a SHA-256 hash of the PEM content of the CA bundle
253	ConfigMap and stamps it as a pod template annotation:
254	
255	```
256	cert-manager.io/ca-bundle-hash: <hex(sha256(pem_bytes))>
257	```
258	
259	This annotation lives on `spec.template.metadata.annotations`, so any change to
260	it causes Kubernetes to roll the Deployment. Using a content hash rather than
261	`resourceVersion` ensures:
262	
263	- Spurious metadata-only updates to the ConfigMap (e.g., label changes) do not
264	  trigger unnecessary pod restarts.
265	- Actual PEM content changes always trigger a restart, even if
266	  `resourceVersion` increments were missed between reconcile cycles.
267	
268	The hash is computed by the reconciler before calling `getDeploymentObject` and
269	is passed as `caBundleHash string` into `updateDefaultCAPackageVolume`.
270	
271	---
272	
273	## 8. Reconciliation flow (ASCII)
274	
275	```
276	                         API Server
277	                             |
278	              ┌──────────────┼──────────────┐
279	              │              │              │
280	         CertManager    TrustManager    IstioCSR
281	         CR watch        CR watch        CR watch
282	              │              │              │
283	              ▼              ▼              ▼
284	     ┌────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────────────┐
285	     │  library-go    │  │  controller-runtime manager   │
286	     │  factory.Ctrl  │  │  Reconciler.Reconcile()       │
287	     └────────┬───────┘  └──────────────┬───────────────┘
288	              │                         │
289	     ┌────────▼───────┐        ┌────────▼────────┐
290	     │  Read bindata  │        │   Read bindata   │
291	     │  (MustAsset)   │        │   (MustAsset)    │
292	     └────────┬───────┘        └────────┬─────────┘
293	              │                         │
294	     ┌────────▼───────┐        ┌────────▼────────────────┐
295	     │  Apply hooks   │        │  validateDeploymentManifest  │
296	     │  (ordered      │        │  (guard — IrrecoverableError │
297	     │   HookFuncs)   │        │   on schema mismatch)        │
298	     └────────┬───────┘        └────────┬─────────────────┘
299	              │                         │
300	     ┌────────▼───────┐        ┌────────▼────────────────┐
301	     │  OptionalInformer│       │  Named mutation funcs   │
302	     │  .Applicable()?│        │  (image, args, envs,    │
303	     │  yes→extra hooks│        │   hash annotation, ...)  │
304	     └────────┬───────┘        └────────┬─────────────────┘
305	              │                         │
306	     ┌────────▼───────┐        ┌────────▼────────────────┐
307	     │ deploymentctrl │        │  SSA Patch               │
308	     │ .NewDeployment │        │  (client.Apply +         │
309	     │  Controller()  │        │   ForceOwnership)        │
310	     └────────┬───────┘        └────────┬─────────────────┘
311	              │                         │
312	     ┌────────▼───────────────────────────────────────────┐
313	     │           Kubernetes API (Deployment applied)       │
314	     └────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
315	              │
316	     ┌────────▼──────────┐
317	     │  ClusterOperator   │  ← library-go path only
318	     │  status updated    │
319	     └────────────────────┘
320	```
321	
322	Key invariants that hold across both paths:
323	
324	- Images are always resolved from `RELATED_IMAGE_*` env vars, never from the
325	  CRD spec or hardcoded strings.
326	- Mutation functions run after the validation guard; the guard failure is
327	  non-retryable (IrrecoverableError / Degraded condition).
328	- OpenShift-specific hooks (cloud credentials, TLS profile) are gated by
329	  `OptionalInformer.Applicable()` so the operator runs on any Kubernetes
330	  distribution.
331	- CEL admission rules prevent illegal field transitions before any reconciler
332	  sees the updated object.
333

text: Let me also check the deployment tests and the existing CEL patterns for optional immutable fields.

content:
1	package istiocsr
2	
3	import (
4		"os"
5		"strings"
6		"time"
7	
8		certmanagerapi "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager"
9		certmanagerv1 "github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pkg/apis/certmanager/v1"
10	)
11	
12	const (
13		// istiocsrCommonName is the name commonly used for naming resources.
14		istiocsrCommonName = "cert-manager-istio-csr"
15	
16		// ControllerName is the name of the controller used in logs and events.
17		ControllerName = istiocsrCommonName + "-controller"
18	
19		// controllerProcessedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource once after
20		// successful reconciliation by the controller.
21		controllerProcessedAnnotation = "operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-processed"
22	
23		// controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource when multiple
24		// instances of istiocsr resource is created.
25		controllerProcessingRejectedAnnotation = "operator.openshift.io/istio-csr-reject-multiple-instance"
26	
27		// finalizer name for istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.
28		finalizer = "istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/" + ControllerName
29	
30		// defaultRequeueTime is the default reconcile requeue time.
31		defaultRequeueTime = time.Second * 30
32	
33		// istiocsrObjectName is the name of the istio-csr resource created by user.
34		// istio-csr CRD enforces name to be `default`.
35		istiocsrObjectName = "default"
36	
37		// istiocsrContainerName is the name of the container created for istiocsr.
38		istiocsrContainerName = istiocsrCommonName
39	
40		// istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName is the environment variable key name
41		// containing the image name of the istiocsr as value.
42		istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName = "RELATED_IMAGE_CERT_MANAGER_ISTIOCSR"
43	
44		// istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name
45		// containing the image version of the istiocsr as value.
46		istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName = "ISTIOCSR_OPERAND_IMAGE_VERSION"
47	
48		// defaultClusterID is the default Kubernetes cluster identifier used by istio-csr
49		// when no custom cluster ID is configured.
50		defaultClusterID = "Kubernetes"
51	
52		// defaultIstioRevision is the Istio default revision name. When this revision is
53		// specified, the DNS SAN uses the base istiod service name rather than a
54		// revision-prefixed name.
55		defaultIstioRevision = "default"
56	
57		// istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt is the format string for the istiocsr GRPC service endpoint.
58		istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt = "%s.%s.svc:%d"
59	
60		// istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate common name
61		// and default DNS name.
62		istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt = "istiod.%s.svc"
63	
64		// istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate DNS name
65		// for each defined revision.
66		istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName = "istiod-%s.%s.svc"
67	
68		// istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate URI.
69		istiodCertificateSpiffeURIFmt = "spiffe://%s/ns/%s/sa/istiod-service-account"
70	
71		// istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName is the label name for identifying the cluster resources or resources
72		// created in other namespaces by the controller.
73		istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName = "cert-manager-istio-csr-namespace"
74	
75		// IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the label name for identifying the resources of interest for the
76		// controller but does not create or manage the resource.
77		IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName = "istiocsr.openshift.operator.io/watched-by"
78	
79		// istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the value format assigned to istiocsrResourceWatchLabelName label, which
80		// will be of the form <istiocsr_namespace>/<istiocsr_instance-Name>.
81		istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt = "%s_%s"
82	
83		// IstiocsrCAConfigMapName is the name of the configmap which is mounted in istiocsr container, containing the
84		// CA certificate configured in the secret referenced in the issuer.
85		IstiocsrCAConfigMapName = istiocsrCommonName + "-issuer-ca-copy"
86	
87		// IstiocsrCAKeyName is the key name holding the CA certificate in the issuer secret or the controller
88		// CA configmap.
89		IstiocsrCAKeyName = "ca.crt"
90	)
91	
92	var (
93		controllerDefaultResourceLabels = map[string]string{
94			"app":                          istiocsrCommonName,
95			"app.kubernetes.io/name":       istiocsrCommonName,
96			"app.kubernetes.io/instance":   istiocsrCommonName,
97			"app.kubernetes.io/version":    os.Getenv(istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName),
98			"app.kubernetes.io/managed-by": "cert-manager-operator",
99			"app.kubernetes.io/part-of":    "cert-manager-operator",
100		}
101	)
102	
103	var (
104		clusterIssuerKind = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.ClusterIssuerKind)
105		issuerKind        = strings.ToLower(certmanagerv1.IssuerKind)
106		issuerGroup       = strings.ToLower(certmanagerapi.GroupName)
107	)
108	
109	// asset names are the files present in the root bindata/ dir. Which are then loaded
110	// and made available by the pkg/operator/assets package.
111	const (
112		certificateAssetName        = "istio-csr/istiod-certificate.yaml"
113		clusterRoleAssetName        = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrole.yaml"
114		clusterRoleBindingAssetName = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-clusterrolebinding.yaml"
115		deploymentAssetName         = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-deployment.yaml"
116		roleAssetName               = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-role.yaml"
117		roleLeasesAssetName         = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-role.yaml"
118		roleBindingAssetName        = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-rolebinding.yaml"
119		roleBindingLeasesAssetName  = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-leases-rolebinding.yaml"
120		serviceAssetName            = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-service.yaml"
121		metricsServiceAssetName     = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-metrics-service.yaml"
122		serviceAccountAssetName     = "istio-csr/cert-manager-istio-csr-serviceaccount.yaml"
123	)
124	
125	const (
126		DefaultCertificateDuration            = time.Hour
127		DefaultCertificateRenewBeforeDuration = time.Minute * 30
128		DefaultPrivateKeyAlgorithm            = certmanagerv1.RSAKeyAlgorithm
129		DefaultRSAPrivateKeySize              = 2048
130		DefaultECDSA256PrivateKeySize         = 256
131		DefaultECDSA384PrivateKeySize         = 384
132	)
133	
134	var istioCSRNetworkPolicyAssets = []string{
135		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-deny-all-networkpolicy.yaml",
136		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-egress-to-api-server-networkpolicy.yaml",
137		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-metrics-networkpolicy.yaml",
138		"networkpolicies/istio-csr-allow-ingress-to-grpc-networkpolicy.yaml",
139	}
140
